title: Pasta Parmesan with Roasted Bell Pepper & Tuscan Marinara
description: HelloFresh Hall of Fame — penne pasta tossed with sweet browned bell peppers in a rich, garlicky Tuscan-spiced marinara sauce, topped with a crispy mozzarella and panko crust. A weeknight pasta bake that hits every comfort food note.

ingredients.item: Tuscan heat spice blend or red pepper flakes

instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Cook penne in salted boiling water until just al dente (1–2 minutes less than package directions). Drain, reserving ½ cup pasta water.
Dice onion and slice bell peppers into strips. Mince garlic.
Heat olive oil in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat. Add onion and bell peppers; cook 6–8 minutes until softened and lightly caramelized.
Add garlic, Italian seasoning, and red pepper flakes; cook 1 minute. Add crushed tomatoes, sugar, salt, and pepper. Simmer 5 minutes. Taste and adjust seasoning.
Add drained pasta to the sauce and toss to combine, adding a splash of pasta water if needed.
In a small bowl, mix panko, mozzarella, and half the parmesan. Sprinkle evenly over the pasta.
Bake 15–20 minutes until the topping is golden and the sauce is bubbling.
Garnish with remaining parmesan and fresh basil. Serve directly from the pan.
tips: Undercooking the pasta slightly before baking is important — it will finish cooking in the oven and won't turn mushy.
For a meaty version, brown ½ lb Italian sausage with the onions.
The Tuscan heat spice blend HelloFresh uses is essentially a mix of red pepper flakes, garlic, and herbs — a pinch of each works perfectly.
This dish reheats well with a splash of water to loosen the sauce.
